name: Exelerate Capital Corp.
summary: Exelerate Capital Corp. does not have significant operations. It intends to identify and evaluate businesses or assets with a view to completing a qualifying transaction. The company was formerly known as Exelerate Health Inc. and changed its name to Exelerate Capital Corp. in February 2019. Exelerate Capital Corp. was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
